title: Phaedranthus exsertus
taxonomy: Phaedranthus exsertus is classified within the family Alstroemeriaceae. It belongs to the genus Phaedranthus, which is a small group of flowering plants. The species is native to South America and is known for its unique appearance. Phaedranthus exsertus is a type of flowering plant that is closely related to the more well-known Gloriosa and Alstroemeria species. Further classification includes its order, family, and kingdom, which are Asparagales, Alstroemeriaceae, and Plantae respectively.
